code:
import io
import string

fn rot13_byte(_ b: Int) -> Int
  if b >= 65 and b <= 90
    (b - 65 + 13) % 26 + 65
  else if b >= 97 and b <= 122
    (b - 97 + 13) % 26 + 97
  else
    b
  end
end

fn rot13(_ s: String) -> String
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut result = ""
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(v)
      rot13_byte(v)
    when None
      0
    end
    result = "#{result}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let line_opt = io.read_line()
  match line_opt
  when Some(line)
    println(rot13(line))
  when None
    println("")
  end
end
